mano_cua.result_summary: Cmd+Shift+K全选删除第一个Markdown块内容后，块分隔符保持正常、语言类型标识未变、第二个Plain Text块内容完全保留，未发现块损坏或类型错乱
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Cmd+Shift+K functionality works correctly. When all content in a block is selected and deleted with this keyboard shortcut, the block structure (separators and language type identifiers) remains intact, and other blocks are unaffected. The operation successfully deleted only the content of the first markdown block while preserving the block itself and the entire second text block.
